sglang.title: Add pytorch sampling backend ut
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Before #1392 was merged, using --sampling-backend pytorch will fail when cuda graph capture (parameter min_ps was not passed). So add a unit test to make sure it works fine.

sglang.title: Enable torch.compile for triton backend
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
w/ torch.compile
python3 -m sglang.bench_latency --model meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B --batch-size 1 --input 128 --output 8 --attention-backend triton --enable-torch-compile
Decode.  median latency: 0.00616 s, median throughput:    162.40 token/s

w/o torch.compile
python3 -m sglang.bench_latency --mo

sglang.title: Add libibverbs-dev to Dockerfile
sglang.author: Aphoh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently when running sglang in a multi-node configuration with infiniband and NCCL_DEBUG=INFO, the logs will contain
...
NCCL INFO Failed to open libibverbs.so[.1]
...
NCCL INFO NET/Socket : Using [0]ib0.<ip>
...

This means all-reduces will be performed over TCP instead of gpu RDMA. In

Support MiniCPM3-4B.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] fix functionalization
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
manually fix the functionalization pass of torch.compile
without compile, after profiling the model, we have:
INFO 09-13 19:19:09 gpu_executor.py:122] # GPU blocks: 27975, # CPU blocks: 2048

after turning on torch compile, with this pr, we have:
INFO 09-13 19:20:44 gpu_executor.py:122] # GPU blocks

vllm.title: [torch.compile] add a flag to disable custom op
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
our final goal is to remove these custom op except for the attention op.
many custom ops are just manual fusions. and we expect torch.compile to do a better job.
however, currently torch.compile will cost more memory.
here we put a new flag to test the behavior.
current
VLLM_TEST_DYNAMO_GRAPH_CAPTUR

vllm.title: [TPU] Implement multi-step scheduling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR implements simple multi-step scheduling for TPU, which can be combined with async output processing.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Model] Fix Python 3.8 compatibility in Pixtral model by updating type annotations
vllm.author: chrisociepa
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR updates the position_meshgrid function in the Pixtral model to ensure compatibility with Python 3.8. The change replaces the built-in list with List from the typing module in the type annotations. This adjustment resolves issues with type hinting in Python 3.8, where support for generic type
